title: Science with Code
knowledge_note: Ibn al-Haytham (Alhazen) invented the scientific method 1000 years ago. Science and Islam walk together — curiosity about the universe is an act of worship.
explanation: The science module gives you physics formulas as ready-made recipes. Gravity, speed, energy, temperature — all built in.
starter_code:
use science
remember mass = 70
remember force = science.gravity(mass)
say "Gravity force: " + force + " N"
say science.celsius_to_fahrenheit(100)
worked_example:
use science
remember mass = 70
remember force = science.gravity(mass)
say "Gravity force: " + force + " N"
say science.celsius_to_fahrenheit(100)
challenge: Calculate the gravity force for your own weight.
hint: Change mass = 70 to your weight in kg.
